name: Abyss Queen
effect: Each time another player plays a Modifier card on one of your rolls, +1 to your roll.

name: Anuran Cauldron
effect: Each time you roll, +1 to your roll.

name: Artic Aries
effect: Each time you successfully roll to use a Hero card's effect, you may DRAW a card.

name: Bloodwing
effect: Each time another player CHALLENGES you, that player must DISCARD a card.

name: Corrupted Sabretooth
effect: Each time you would DESTROY a Hero card, you may STEAL that Hero card instead.

name: Crowned Serpent
effect: Each time any player (including you) plays a Modifier card, you may DRAW a card.

name: Dark Dragon King
effect: Each time you roll for a Hero card's effect, +1 to your roll.

name: Dracos
effect: Each time a Hero card in your Party is destroyed, you may DRAW a card.

name: Malamammoth
effect: Each time you DRAW an Item card, you may play it immediately.

name: Mega Slime
effect:
You may spend an extra action point on each of your turns.

(Specific Rule: Once defeated, you gain the monster ability. You may spend the extra action on the turn it is defeated.)

name: Orthus
effect: Each time you DRAW a Magic card, you may play it immediately.

name: Rex Major
effect: Each time you DRAW a Modifier card, you may reveal it and DRAW a second card.

name: Terratuga
effect: Your Hero cards cannot be destroyed.

name: Titan Wyvern
effect: Each time you roll for a Challenge card, +1 to your roll.

name: Warworn Owlbear
effect: Item cards you play cannot be challenged.

name: Bad Axe
effect: DESTROY a Hero card.

name: Bear Claw
effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If it is a Hero card, pull a second card from that player's hand.

name: Beary Wise
effect: Each other player must DISCARD a card. Choose one of the discarded cards and add it to your hand.

name: Fury Knuckle
effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If it is a Challenge card, pull a second card from that player's hand.

name: Heavy Bear
effect: Choose a player. That player must DISCARD 2 cards.

name: Pan Chucks
effect: DRAW 2 cards. If at least one of those cards is a Challenge card, you may reveal it, then DESTROY a Hero card.

name: Qi Bear
effect: DISCARD up to 3 cards. For each card discarded, DESTROY a Hero card.

name: Tough Teddy
effect: Each other player with a Fighter in their Party must DISCARD a card.

name: Dodgy Dealer
effect: Trade hands with another player.

effect: DRAW a card and play a Hero card from your hand immediately.

name: Greedy Cheeks
effect: Each other player must give you a card from their hand.

effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If that card is a Hero card, you may play it immediately

effect: DRAW a card. If that card is a Hero card, you may play it immediately.

effect: Search the discard pile for a Hero card and add it to your hand.

effect: Search the discard pile for an item card and add it to your hand.
